description_for_human: Generate complete, playable HTML5 games from modular design inputs using AI. Configure genre, mechanics, art style, menus, and audio — no coding required.
description_for_model: A browser-based prompt orchestrator that turns modular game design inputs (genre, mechanics, art style, menus, audio) into complete, self-contained, playable HTML5 games generated by AI. Supports OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Ollama, and LM Studio. Runs entirely client-side with no backend. Users bring their own API key.

game_generation.description: Generate a complete HTML5 game from modular design parameters

game_refinement.description: Incrementally refine an existing generated game with natural language instructions

notes: This is a capability declaration. The actual application runs entirely client-side in the browser — there is no server endpoint. The openapi.json describes the conceptual inputs and outputs of the game generation pipeline. To actually generate games, a user must open the web app in a browser and configure an AI provider. API keys are stored in the browser's localStorage and sent directly to the chosen AI provider.
